title: Congress And Bjp All Set For Another Direct Clash In Davangere South By-Poll
description: In the ensuing by-poll, Congress party fielded Samarth Mallikarjun son of Minister of Mines and Geology S.S. Mallikarjun. From the Bharatiya Janata Party Srinivas Dasakariyappa is in the fray trying his luck in the stronghold of the Congress party.
